tools.name: process_refund
tools.description: Refund a charge, fully or partially. Preconditions: charge exists and is not already fully refunded; refund amount <= unrefunded remainder. Effects: Refund created (pending -> succeeded/failed); funds return to the original card; fully refunded charges can no longer be disputed.

amount.description: MonetaryAmount (L1) in smallest currency unit; omit for full refund

tools.name: cancel_refund
tools.description: Cancel an in-flight refund. Precondition: refund status is requires_action — the ONLY state permitting cancellation. Effect: status -> canceled.

tools.name: submit_dispute_evidence
tools.description: Submit evidence to contest a dispute. Preconditions: dispute status is needs_response; before evidence_details.due_by; combined evidence fields <= 150,000 characters. Effect: ALL evidence hash fields are submitted together for bank review — partial updates submit the whole hash.

tools.name: close_dispute
tools.description: Concede a dispute without submitting evidence. Precondition: status is needs_response. Effect: status -> lost. IRREVERSIBLE — confirm with a human before calling.
